overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a gritty cyberpunk-style indoor corridor with neon lighting, vending machines, and various NPCs. The environment features industrial architecture with metal security gates, colorful graffiti, and scattered debris.

long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The clip begins at the entrance to a gritty indoor corridor, passing through a metal security gate. A green vending machine stands illuminated on the right while the camera moves forward into the dimly lit passage, encountering the first pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a section decorated with vibrant neon graffiti on the left wall and a prominent purple vending machine on the right. Various NPCs with cyberpunk aesthetics walk through the space, including one with glowing green hair, while the camera continues forward over a zebra-print rug.

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues into a darker section featuring a blue arcade machine on the left where an NPC is playing. On the right, a small wooden table with a red office chair sits against the wall near seated individuals. The lighting becomes dimmer as the camera progresses deeper into the passage.

segments.scene_description: The final section of the corridor features metal shelving and posters on the walls as the camera approaches a metal security gate at the end. A security guard stands watch near the gate while another person walks ahead toward the exit, concluding the journey through the gritty cyberpunk corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial corridor that gradually transforms into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk thoroughfare. It begins by passing through a metal security gate at the entrance of a dimly lit passage, gliding past an illuminated green vending machine and a lone pedestrian. As the camera moves deeper into the space, the environment opens up and becomes more colorful, with the walls shifting to feature vibrant neon graffiti. The scene then expands to reveal a more crowded atmosphere filled with cyberpunk NPCs, including one with glowing green hair, while the camera tracks forward over a zebra-print rug toward a prominent purple vending machine.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimming industrial corridor that culminates at a guarded security checkpoint. It begins by gliding past a glowing blue arcade machine and a small wooden table with a red office chair, as the surrounding lighting grows increasingly dark. As the camera progresses deeper into the passage, the environment shifts toward a more utilitarian space filled with metal shelving and wall-mounted posters. The scene then opens up toward the end of the corridor, where a security guard stands watch by a metal gate. Finally, the camera follows another person walking ahead toward the exit, bringing the journey through the gritty cyberpunk hallway to a close.
